metadata.description: Lab marketplace for plugin R&D tooling — instruments for testing, measuring, and iterating Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: ab-bench
plugins.description: Control-vs-plugin A/B testing harness: creates experiment environments, fires paired sessions with everything-else-equal configs, analyzes both session JSONLs + DoD logs + human verdict into an evidence-backed improvement report.

plugins.name: dod-lite
plugins.description: Lightweight per-session Definition-of-Done tracking: script/AI-graded/human-judged checks defined in a project's .dod/ folder, designed via a plan-mode-gated interview skill, enforced at session Stop. ab-bench's recommended companion for real pass/fail tracking.
